scripts.build:wasm: sh -c 'if command -v go >/dev/null 2>&1; then cd .. && GOOS=js GOARCH=wasm go build -trimpath -ldflags="-s -w" -o web/public/validate.wasm ./cmd/wasm && cp "$(go env GOROOT)/lib/wasm/wasm_exec.js" web/public/wasm_exec.js 2>/dev/null || cp "$(go env GOROOT)/misc/wasm/wasm_exec.js" web/public/wasm_exec.js; else echo "go not found — skipping wasm build (validator will be missing at runtime)"; fi'
